name: Susie Lee
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $2,506,290 for Susie Lee in U.S. House, NV-03. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $2,506,290.
Public statements and congressional record context were reviewed for stance updates.
